compiled_state.title: ticket-perf.sh: ticket create/comment/write_commit_event exceed 0.6s threshold after library refactor
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description: After the write_commit_event was moved to bash-native path and ticket_create was moved to ticket-lib-api.sh, the performance test thresholds are consistently exceeded. ticket create mean: ~0.7-1.2s (threshold: 0.6s). Baseline fixture was captured before the library refactor and no longer reflects actual performance. This blocks commits to ticket and ticket-lib-api.sh via centrality-based test gate expansion.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Perf test threshold vs actual performance after library refactor.
comments.author: Worktree
